modules.description: Top-level wrapper instantiating all submodules and connecting pipeline stages
modules.functionality: Top-level module that instantiates all pipeline stage modules (if_stage, id_stage, ex_stage, mem_stage, wb_stage), pipeline registers (if_id_reg, id_ex_reg, ex_mem_reg, mem_wb_reg), and functional units (reg_file, alu, imm_gen, control_unit, hazard_unit). It connects all modules with appropriate signals and provides external memory interfaces for instruction fetch and data access.

modules.description: Instruction fetch stage that generates PC and fetches instructions from IMEM

ports.name: pc_target
ports.description: New PC target value for redirect

ports.name: if_pc
ports.description: Current PC value to IF/ID register

modules.functionality: Generates the program counter (PC) for instruction fetch. Implements PC+4 increment on each cycle. Handles PC redirect from EX (branch resolution) or ID (JAL/JALR). Responds to stall signals from hazard_unit by holding current PC. Flushes instruction when control flow changes (branches taken, jumps). Communicates with instruction memory for single-cycle instruction fetch.

modules.description: Instruction decode stage that decodes instructions, reads register file, and generates control signals

ports.name: id_valid
ports.description: Valid instruction flag from IF/ID register

ports.name: rf_rs1_addr
ports.description: Source register 1 address to register file

ports.name: rf_rs2_addr
ports.description: Source register 2 address to register file

ports.name: rf_rs1_data
ports.description: Source register 1 data from register file

ports.name: rf_rs2_data
ports.description: Source register 2 data from register file

ports.name: id_rs1_addr
ports.description: Source reg 1 addr for forwarding/hazard detection

ports.name: id_rs2_addr
ports.description: Source reg 2 addr for forwarding/hazard detection

ports.name: id_pc_out
ports.description: PC passed through to EX stage

modules.functionality: Decodes incoming instructions to extract opcode, funct3, funct7, and register addresses. Reads source registers from reg_file. Generates sign-extended immediates for all instruction types (I/S/B/U/J). Resolves JAL/JALR targets in this stage (PC+4 for JAL, rs1+imm for JALR). Produces all control signals needed for execution. Passes through PC and register data to ID/EX pipeline register.

modules.description: Execute stage that performs ALU operations and branch resolution

ports.name: fwd_alu_a
ports.description: Forward select for ALU operand A (00=regfile, 01=MEM, 10=WB)

ports.name: fwd_alu_b
ports.description: Forward select for ALU operand B (00=regfile, 01=MEM, 10=WB)

modules.functionality: Performs ALU operations using forwarded operands. Implements operand selection muxes based on forwarding signals from hazard_unit. Computes branch target address (PC + B-type immediate) and evaluates branch condition (BEQ, BNE, BLT, BGE, etc.) using ALU zero flag. Resolves branch taken/not-taken in this stage. Passes ALU result and control signals to EX/MEM pipeline register.

modules.description: Memory access stage that handles load and store operations via DMEM

ports.name: mem_funct3
ports.description: funct3 for load/store size and signedness

ports.name: mem_rdata
ports.description: Load data after alignment and sign-extension

modules.functionality: Handles data memory access for load and store instructions. For stores, outputs address (from ALU result), write data, and byte enables based on funct3. For loads, outputs address and generates appropriate byte enables. Performs data alignment and sign/zero extension for loaded data based on funct3 (LB, LH, LW, LBU, LHU). Passes ALU result through as passthrough for instructions not involving memory.

modules.description: Write-back stage that writes final results to the register file
modules.functionality: Selects the final result to write back to the register file based on wb_sel: ALU result for R/I-type operations, memory data for loads, or PC+4 for JAL/JALR. Writes to register file when rf_we is asserted. Provides wb_result for forwarding to earlier stages. Handles PC+4 computation for link register instructions.

modules.description: 32 x 32-bit general purpose register file with x0 hardwired to zero
modules.functionality: Provides dual-port register file with 32 registers of 32 bits each. Register x0 is hardwired to all zeros and ignores any writes. Supports simultaneous read of two registers and write of one register per clock cycle. Write occurs on positive clock edge when we is asserted.

modules.description: Arithmetic and logic unit performing all RV32I ALU operations
modules.functionality: Performs all RV32I arithmetic and logic operations. Supports: ADD (a+b), SUB (a-b), SLL (a << b[4:0]), SLT (signed comparison), SLTU (unsigned comparison), XOR (a^b), SRL (logical shift right), SRA (arithmetic shift right), OR (a|b), AND (a&b). Sets zero flag when result equals zero for branch condition evaluation.

modules.description: Immediate generator that extracts and sign-extends immediates from instructions
modules.functionality: Extracts immediate values from instructions and sign-extends them to 32 bits. Supports all RV32I immediate types: I-type (bit[31:20] for loads and arithmetic immediates), S-type (stores: bit[31:25]||bit[11:7]), B-type (branches: bit[31]||bit[7]||bit[30:25]||bit[11:8]||0), U-type (upper immediates: bit[31:12]||12'h000), J-type (JAL: bit[31]||bit[19:12]||bit[20]||bit[30:21]||0). The type is determined by the instruction opcode.

modules.description: Main instruction decoder that generates control signals from instruction opcode
modules.functionality: Decodes instruction opcode and funct3/funct7 fields to generate all control signals for the pipeline. Identifies instruction type (R/I/S/B/U/J) and sets appropriate ALU operation code, memory access signals, and write-back selection. Generates branch flag for B-type, jump flag for JAL, and jr flag for JALR instructions.

modules.description: Hazard detection unit that generates stall/flush signals and forwarding logic

ports.name: branch_taken
ports.description: Branch taken signal from EX stage

ports.name: fwd_alu_a
ports.description: Forward select for ALU operand A (00=regfile, 01=MEM, 10=WB)

ports.name: fwd_alu_b
ports.description: Forward select for ALU operand B (00=regfile, 01=MEM, 10=WB)

modules.functionality: Detects data hazards (load-use, RAW) and control hazards (branches, jumps). Generates stall signals for load-use hazard detection. Generates flush signals for branch mispredictions and jumps. Implements full forwarding logic from EX/MEM/WB stages to EX stage ALU inputs. Priority: MEM > WB for forwarding when both have valid data.

modules.description: Pipeline register between IF and ID stages holding fetched instruction and PC

ports.name: flush
ports.description: Flush signal to clear register on branch/jump

ports.name: stall
ports.description: Stall signal to hold current values

ports.name: if_valid
ports.description: Valid instruction flag from IF stage

ports.name: id_valid
ports.description: Valid instruction flag to ID stage

modules.functionality: Holds the fetched instruction, PC, and validity flag between IF and ID stages. On flush, clears outputs (sets to zeros). On stall, holds current values. Otherwise, on positive clock edge, loads new values from IF stage.

modules.description: Pipeline register between ID and EX stages holding decoded instruction data

ports.name: ex_rs1_addr
ports.description: Source register 1 address to EX stage

ports.name: ex_rs2_addr
ports.description: Source register 2 address to EX stage

ports.name: ex_rs1_data
ports.description: Source register 1 data to EX stage

ports.name: ex_rs2_data
ports.description: Source register 2 data to EX stage

ports.name: ex_rd_addr
ports.description: Destination register address to EX stage

ports.name: ex_alu_src
ports.description: ALU source select to EX stage

ports.name: ex_alu_op
ports.description: ALU operation code to EX stage

ports.name: ex_mem_read
ports.description: Memory read enable to EX stage

ports.name: ex_mem_write
ports.description: Memory write enable to EX stage

ports.name: ex_reg_write
ports.description: Register write enable to EX stage

ports.name: ex_branch
ports.description: Branch instruction flag to EX stage

ports.name: ex_jump
ports.description: JAL instruction flag to EX stage

ports.name: ex_jr
ports.description: JALR instruction flag to EX stage

ports.name: ex_valid
ports.description: Valid instruction flag to EX stage

modules.functionality: Passes all decoded instruction information from ID to EX stage. Includes register addresses and data, immediate value, PC, and all control signals. On flush signal, clears all outputs. On positive clock edge, loads new values from ID stage.

modules.description: Pipeline register between EX and MEM stages holding execution results

ports.name: mem_wdata
ports.description: Data to memory to MEM stage

ports.name: mem_rd_addr
ports.description: Destination register address to MEM stage

ports.name: mem_read
ports.description: Memory read enable to MEM stage

ports.name: mem_write
ports.description: Memory write enable to MEM stage

ports.name: mem_reg_write
ports.description: Register write enable to MEM stage

ports.name: mem_valid
ports.description: Valid instruction flag to MEM stage

modules.functionality: Passes ALU result, memory write data, and control signals from EX to MEM stage. On flush signal, clears all outputs. On positive clock edge, loads new values from EX stage.

modules.description: Pipeline register between MEM and WB stages holding memory and ALU results for write-back

ports.name: mem_rdata
ports.description: Data loaded from memory (after alignment and sign-extension)

ports.name: mem_alu_out
ports.description: ALU result passthrough from MEM stage

ports.name: wb_rd_addr
ports.description: Destination register address to WB stage

ports.name: wb_reg_write
ports.description: Register write enable to WB stage

ports.name: wb_valid
ports.description: Valid instruction flag to WB stage

modules.functionality: Passes memory load data and ALU result from MEM to WB stage for final write-back. Provides both sources to WB stage which selects appropriate value based on wb_sel. On flush signal, clears all outputs. On positive clock edge, loads new values from MEM stage.
